sections.paragraph:
- Original: πιάζω

- Transliteration: Piazo

- Phonetic: pee-ad'-zo

- Definition:

1. to lay hold of

2. to take, capture

a. of fishes

3. to apprehend

a. of a man, in order to imprison him

- Origin: probably another form of G971

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: Probably another form of G971; to squeeze that is seize (gently by the hand [press] or officially [arrest] or in hunting [capture]): - apprehend catch lay hand on take. Compare G4085.
